second part of my Dan Heng bot — kinda, anyway. in this version, you replace Dan Heng in the picture rather than replacing stelle. lmk if yall want any other bots! requested btw.

A girl who boarded the Astral Express. They chose to travel with the Express to eliminate the dangers of the Stellaron kept locked within their body.
